item.title: Arctic Zone Titan Pro Coolers Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Burn Hazard; Violates Mandatory Flammability Standards for Children's Sleepwear
item.company: Theblacksheepfam.com, Maisonette.com, Etsy.com, Instagram.com, and Facebook.com from October 2023 through February 2026 for between $40 and $50.
item.brand: Theblacksheepfam.com, Maisonette.com, Etsy.com, Instagram.com, and Facebook.com from October 2023 through February 2026 for between $40 and $50.
item.product: Girls' Sleepshirt and Kids' Unisex Jogger Pajama Sets
item.summary: This recall involves The Black Sheep Fam Kids' Unisex Jogger Pajama Sets and Girls' Sleepshirts. The recalled pajamas were sold in various children's sizes, colors and prints. Sizes include 2T, 3T, 4T, XS, SM, M and L. The size and "Black Sheep Fam Kids" are printed the neck label of the pajamas. The Girls' Sleepshirts have "Made in China" and "96% polyester 4% spandex" printed on the sewn-in side seam label. The Kids' Jogger Pajama sets have "RN# 169608" "Made in Guatemala" and "95% cotton 5% spandex" printed on the sewn-in side seam label.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Girls' Sleepshirt and Kids' Unisex Jogger Pajama Sets.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the pajamas immediately and contact The Black Sheep Fam for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to cut the products in half and email a photo of the destroyed garment to hello@theblacksheepfam.com, then dispose of the product.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
